overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a grassy field at night toward a stone church, holding a wooden torch that ignites partway through the approach. The scene is dark with minimal ambient light, creating a tense atmosphere typical of survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grass field approaching historic stone church

events.description: wooden torch ignites with a bright flame, casting warm orange illumination on the grass and church facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant church, holding an unlit wooden torch in the left hand

entered.detail: stone church building with tall pointed steeple and dark roof, silhouetted against the night sky
dense cluster of pine trees flanking the left side of the church
tall pine trees standing to the right of the church building
thick wooden torch held in the left hand, unlit with visible wood grain texture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark night scene in an open grass field. The camera holder walks forward toward a distant stone church with a prominent steeple, flanked by pine trees on both sides. The wooden torch is initially unlit, making the church barely visible against the dark sky. Near the end of the segment, the torch ignites, dramatically changing the lighting and revealing details of the grass and building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: church grounds perimeter with stone wall

agents.ego_description: continuing to approach the church with the torch now lit, illuminating the path and revealing the stone wall surrounding the church grounds

entered.detail: low stone wall surrounding the church property, becoming visible as the camera approaches

changed.to: lit torch with visible flame and glowing embers

segments.scene_description: With the torch now providing warm illumination, the camera continues walking forward through the grass field. The stone church grows larger in the frame as the distance closes, and a stone perimeter wall becomes visible surrounding the church grounds. The pine trees on either side move from the far distance to the near ground, framing the approach to the historic stone building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark field that transforms from a shadowy void into a warmly lit approach to a stone church. It begins with a walk through an open grassy expanse under a dark night sky, where a distant church steeple and flanking pine trees are barely visible. As the camera advances, the unlit wooden torch suddenly ignites, dramatically shifting the lighting to reveal the textures of the surrounding grass and the building's facade. The scene then expands as the warm glow illuminates a stone perimeter wall and brings the nearby pine trees into sharp focus. Finally, the camera closes the distance to the historic stone building, which grows larger in the frame as the path leads directly toward the church grounds.
